column1: # Nano Sweep 06 — LOOP_GATE_MODE prototype (natural-selection in-run decisions)
# Three-way comparison at locked config + nano reduced batch:
#   - always:   legacy behavior (enable layer_loop at frac >= 0.35)
#   - adaptive: enable only when val_bpb improvement between evals drops below LOOP_GATE_EPSILON
# Decisions audit written to logs/decisions_<label>.md for each run.
# Total ~90 min (3 x ~22 min). Uses locked-config + matrix_040 + scalar_030 (best combo on Nano).
